description: Style NoteTake nautical style to an all new high with this pair from gliders. With a innovative new update to the classic boat shoe, this versatile piece looks great with off-duty ensembles (not just lounge wear) The lovely brown upper and midsole is designed with a greased feel for a pared down, downtown cool. Style this with rolled up denims and a tonal monochrome tee for a minimalist look. Throw on a beige casual blazer and replace the tee for a linen casual shirt for a more dressy vibe. Product Details Round toed boat shoes with two hole lace-upsHas stitch detailing at the seams of the toe boxEyelets and braid detail around the mouth of the shoeMildly padded inner and a soft footbedPU midsole Rubber outsole in white with herringbone and brick wall style grooves all overMaterial and CareSuedeUse a leather conditioner to clean productDo not store in direct sunlight
